name: She Jian (Wengu)
page_title: She Jian (Wengu) 射堅 (文固) [Han, Liu Zhang, Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
His brother was She Jian, style name, Wengu, was a Huangmen Shi Lang. At the beginning of the reign of Han Xian Di, there was lots of famine so he was dismissed from office. Together with his brother, She Yuan, they entered Shu and submitted to Liu Zhang. Liu Zhang made She Jian as Chang Shi. After Liu Bei took over, he made She Jian the Governor of Guang Han prefecture.

Liu Bei’s sgz

full_text:
She Jian (Wengu) 射堅 (文固)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
She Jian (射堅), styledWengu (文固), was born in Youfufeng. Of good repute, sacked during time of famine, went to Yi from Chang’an. She Jian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Zhang, and the Shu Kingdom.
